channel.title: algorithms on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in algorithms on Frank Huang

item.title: Contraction hierarchy
item.description: Lately I have to work on the routing problem on a road network data. One option to get this task done is using (dijkstra algorithm)[] as I described and implement here. However, a faster algorithm is required to perform routing between a long distance such as cities in 2 different province. Contraction hierarchy caught my eyes very soon after doing some research. Since pgrouing provided some base case for the preprocessing part of the algorithm which is contraction.

item.title: Thoughts about Permutation algorithms
item.description: Classic problems that are related to permutation TSP traversal version Permutation algorithms in Leetcode #77, #78, #46, #60, #31
